introSection: Racing (also known as Vierer-Bob) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Meli Park in Adinkerke-De Panne, West Flanders, Flemish Region, Belgium. It was manufactured by Zierer.
fullText: Racing (also known as Vierer-Bob) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Meli Park in Adinkerke-De Panne, West Flanders, Flemish Region, Belgium. It was manufactured by Zierer.
